title: NGE Manga English translation published
wikitext:
[]: NGE Manga English translation/published? Post by Brofose » Mon May 07, 2012 10:32 pm Please lock this thread/redirect me if this has a thread already. (Posting from a Kindle and the search bar isn't working) I was wondering if the NGE manga is worth looking into? I finished the anime/rebuild movies a few months back, so I've been thinking about trying out the Manga to hold me over till the third movie is released. Is the manga worth picking up? If so, is there a specific fan translation that I should look for, or is the official one good enough? Is there a huge trade paerback that collects all the chapters, or am I looking at buying tons of back issues? Sorry for all the questions, just looking at my options here and figured you guys would know best.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon May 07, 2012 10:50 pm where is Carl Horn when you need him?

[]: Post by Ornette » Mon May 07, 2012 11:11 pm Check out this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6206/MANGANGE-Whats-the-general-consensus-here/
